title: Create: Age of Electricity
description: A Highly Optimized Modpack featuring mainly Create and Mekanism with various addons.
body:
**Create Age of Electricity** is a highly optimized [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) centered modpack, while making every mod compatible with each other. 
Most of Mekanism's QoL features are usable without using a lot of its complicated machinery.
Perfect for anyone looking for a chill time with or without friends.

Non Modrinth Mods used:
-[Corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
-[Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

Note: This modpack is still in developement, if you encounter any bugs be sure to contact me (crash_ratter on discord), i will try my best to find a fix :>
